features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pack Fighter - Fast pack hunter with group tactics
tactical_info.positioning: Works with allies to gain advantage on attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 3 piercing per hit with advantage when in groups
tactical_info.key_abilities: Pack Tactics, high speed (50 ft), good perception
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low individual combat capability, relies on numbers
tactical_info.synergies: Deadly in packs, works well with other pack animals
